'''Siadem Forte''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Forte took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and fought valiantly against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. At the end of the war, the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the beginning of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] saw Forte deemed a fugitive and on the run. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Forte confronted [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and was slain on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
[[File:FirstBattleOfKashyyyk-EGTW.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Darth Vader prepares to strike down Forte and Iwo Kulka]]
Like most of his peers, Siadem Forte was most likely discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] on his homeworld and turned over to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Entering into the [[Jedi academy|academy]] there, Forte eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] and was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] for an apprenticeship. After years of study as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Forte passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|made]] a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="DL" />

A short, thick-bodied man, Forte eventually went on to selected the [[Togruta/Legends|Togruta]] [[Deran Nalual]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together, the duo was recalled to the Coruscant Temple at the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], where Forte accepted the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the newly created [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] to combat the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]]. Fighting side-by-side with [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone Troopers]] over the course of the three years of war, Forte and Nalual were caught unaware when the Republic crumbled and its [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army, ordering them to kill their Jedi compatriots. Able to kill their clones before they were overrun, Forte issued [[Emergency Code Nine Thirteen/Legends|Emergency Code Nine Thirteen]] from his personal [[Jedi beacon/Legends|Jedi beacon]] on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]] and waited in hiding for responders. When eight other Jedi arrived, Forte took the lead as he was the oldest and lead the group in the hijacking a [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]]. Fleeing the planet, the group was harried by [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170s]] and a light cruiser, which saw the death of two of the Jedi crew. Limping through space, the group met up with the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]'' and were given sanctuary by its [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Jula Shryne]].<ref name="DL" />

Traveling aboard Shryne's ship, the group was eventually enlarged with the arrival of Padawan [[Olee Starstone]] and her adopted Master, [[Roan Shryne]]. After a drawn out discussion as to what to do, Starstone encouraged the Jedi to go to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in order to find [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. After arriving and speaking with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] chieftains there, the world was [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|attacked]] by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was hunting the fugitive Jedi. Paired with Knight [[Iwo Kulka]], Forte and the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] attacked together, but were no match for Vader. After receiving a strike to the shoulder and thigh, Forte and Kulka were both [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] by Vader as they attempted to rise to attack. While Master Shryne attempted to strike Vader down with Forte's sapphire lightsaber, the weapon did not guide its new master to victory either. While his Padawan and several other of his comrades escaped, Forte's memory was further slandered when images of his body were used as anti-Jedi propaganda on the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]].<ref name="DL" />

==Powers and abilities==
Siadem was a trained Jedi Knight who managed to survive the initial stage of Order 66 with his Padawan, killing the Clone Troopers who turned on them. During the Battle of Kashyyyk, he killed several Stormtroopers and worked well with Iwo Kulka against Vader, changing styles multiple times during the duel. Despite this, they were unable to harm the Sith Lord, who easily met the Jedi’s every move and killed them both.<ref name="DL" />
